title: IAP [Industrial Foregoing]
description: This is an Industrial Agriculture Plugin to add crops for Industrial Foregoing
body:
Industrial Agriculture Plugin

This is a plugin for Industrial Agriculture to add crops for Industrial Foregoing.
This is requires the core mod, which can be found here: CLICK

You also will need to get the Industrial Foregoing mod here: CLICK

Seeds Added:

  • Plastic
  • Pink Slime
